case_title: BICHSEL AMALGAMATED VS. WESTBAY SEAFOOD COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,580.00 FILED BY BICHSEL AMALGAMATED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBAY SEAFOOD COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $NONE) SERVED MAY-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBAY SEAFOOD COMPANY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BICHSEL AMALGAMATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTBAY SEAFOOD COMPANY, INC. $2,580.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
